name: Confetti Beans
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Full fat soft cheese, cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green beans according to the packet instructions and drain them.
2. Heat the kidney and butter beans together, then drain them.
3. Mix all the hot beans together in a saucepan.
4. Add the Worcesterhire sauce, pepper, mustard, and cheese.
5. Heat gently, stirring occasionally until the cheese melts.
6. Serve immediately.
